title: Add MUST enforcement for S=1 Schnorr signatures on all RPL control messages (DIO/DAO/DIS)
description: Per draft-lichen-link-01.md and draft-lichen-rpl-lora-00.md, all RPL control frames MUST set S=1. Implement validation in lichen/subsys/lichen/rpl/ to reject unsigned frames before any state mutation. Link to project-LICHEN-et78.2
